chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.8363 of 2018 Muhammad Shafiq & others Versus EOBI & others ______________________________________________________________ Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 01.02.2021 Mr. Ameeruddin for petitioners. Mr. M. Nishat Warsi, Deputy Attorney General. Ms. Nida Salim for EOBI/respondent No.1. Mr. Sanaullah Noor Ghouri for respondent No.3. -.-.- All counsels in attendance have agreed that insofar as pending applications of the petitioners are concerned, which are yet to be decided one way or the other by respondent No.1, be considered on their merit and be disposed of after hearing the petitioners in all in accordance with law, preferably in eight weeks’ time. Order accordingly. Respondents may also submit periodical report fortnightly to the effect that they are considering the applications of the petitioners. Petitioners however if aggrieved of any decision that may be passed on their respective applications, may avail the remedy before appellate forum having jurisdiction in this regard. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms subject to filing of periodical reports, as stated above. Judge Judge
